examples: He needs to learn to curb his temper.
It's easier to pick up apples than to drag tree branches all the way to the curb.
If patients pay very little out of their own pockets, they have little desire to curb consumption.
Ministers say action is needed to curb the 60% increase in road-related personal injury claims since 2006.
We sat on the curb in front of a band of idle musicians and began to drink.
